summary: Iter30 — PUTKI HQ Voita recent-winners refinements e2e. Backend pytest 33/33 PASS (test_sprint_voita_recent_winners.py 15/15 + test_sprint_voita_engine.py 18/18) covering: mask_email (major-provider domain retention 'a***@gmail.com', non-major TLD masking 'm***@***.fi', firstname.lastname full-mask '***@gmail.com', short-local + digit-edge fallbacks, empty/invalid → ''), display_name capture (optional, sanitised — angle brackets stripped, persisted on entry doc, surfaced via /api/admin/voita/raffles/{id}/entries), mark-paid (200 only from drawn → status='paid' + paid_at ISO; re-mark 400; non-drawn 400), GET /api/voita/raffles?status=paid&limit=N (view='paid', items[] carry paid_at + drawn_at + winners[].display_label = display_name OR email_masked, honours voita_feature_enabled flag → empty items + feature_enabled:false when off), drawn-but-not-paid raffle excluded from ?status=paid filter, paid raffles reject PUT (400) + DELETE (400). Frontend e2e: /voita/{slug} entry page renders [data-testid=voita-recent-winners] ABOVE [data-testid=voita-entry-form] (DOM order verified compareDocumentPosition); strip card surfaces sport/league pill, 'HJK vs Inter · 2–1', 'DRAWN 19 May 26 · PAID 19 May 26' (EN) / 'ARVOTTU 19.5.26 · MAKSETTU 19.5.26' (FI), #1 badge + Alice K. display_label (display_name preferred) + €250 CASH, plus the footer note 'Names shown only when winners chose to be visible. Otherwise emails are masked.'; entry form fields: 01 pick 1/X/2, 02 score, 03 email, 04 [data-testid=voita-display-name] OPTIONAL maxlength=40, 05 [data-testid=voita-rules-accepted]; submitting with display_name BLANK successfully routes to /voita/{slug}/kiitos ✓; FI locale 'VIIMEISIMMÄT VOITTAJAT · 3 MAKSETTUA ARVONTAA' header + Finnish date format ✓; RecentWinnersStrip is ABSENT from /voita listing page (moved per spec) ✓; RecentWinnersStrip returns null when voita_feature_enabled=false (strip hidden, no placeholder shown) ✓. BackOfficeVoita header tabs now show TOTAL/DRAFT/OPEN/DRAWN/PAID with counts; PAID pill is green-tinted; status <select> does NOT offer 'paid' (verified via DOM scan — paid_in_status_select=false). MARK PAID button source verified at BackOfficeVoita.jsx:318 (data-testid=raffle-mark-paid-btn with text '✓ MARK PAID') — UI expansion not exercised due to selector-loop limit (3 attempts), but backend pytest covers the endpoint fully. Cleanup: deleted iter30-blank-* raffle, restored voita_feature_enabled=false.
test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: putki-hq-admin (BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN). Public has no auth.
critical_code_review_comments: RecentWinnersStrip footer disclosure 'Names shown only when winners chose to be visible' is a nice GDPR-aligned UX nudge — keep it.

BackOfficeVoita list view shows aggregated text per row; the DRAWN-row → EDIT expand → MARK PAID button flow is implemented in source (line 318) but the row-expand interaction is fiddly to drive in Playwright because the click target is a textual 'EDIT ▾' button inside a flat layout. Consider exposing a stable [data-testid=voita-row-{slug}-edit] on the row toggle to make the admin flow CI-testable end-to-end without DOM walking heuristics.

Email masking covers 8 major providers — if a new provider becomes common in FI (e.g. fastmail.com), add it to the allow-list; otherwise legitimate Fastmail users get TLD-masked 'a***@***.com' which is over-aggressive.

display_name sanitisation strips '<' and '>' but does not strip newline / control chars or normalise unicode — low risk because the strip renders as plain text, but worth noting for future XSS hardening.
/api/voita/recent-winners endpoint removal is correctly handled (consolidated into /api/voita/raffles?status=paid&limit=N) — no leftover client references.
seed_data_creation: Created two temp raffles during the run: iter30-uitest-1779195251 (kept — became PAID via end-to-end flow and is now part of the recent-winners strip seed for next run) and iter30-blank-1779195348 (deleted after blank-display_name regression test). Feature flag flipped True→False per teardown contract. 17 pre-existing pytest-paid-* + pytest-not-paid-* raffles from this and previous iters now make up the PAID/DRAWN sample set — main agent may sweep them via DELETE /api/admin/voita/raffles/{id} (or leave them as fixtures; they only surface when the flag is on).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voita refinements (recent-winners strip masking, display_name capture, ?status=paid filter, mark-paid endpoint, strip moved above entry form, /voita listing strip removed, empty-state silent when no paid raffles) are production-ready. Backend 33/33 + frontend e2e all PASS. To re-run: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_sprint_voita_recent_winners.py tests/test_sprint_voita_engine.py -v (MUST run from /app/backend to resolve voita_engine import; running from /app fails with ModuleNotFoundError — not a regression, the test file imports voita_engine directly). Frontend testids of interest for next iter: voita-recent-winners (mounted on entry page only), voita-display-name (step 04, optional maxlength=40), voita-rules-accepted (step 05), voita-entry-form, raffle-mark-paid-btn (inside expanded DRAWN row in BackOfficeVoita), raffle-drawn-lock (banner on drawn+paid raffles). Production state: voita_feature_enabled=false (restored at teardown).
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — clean iteration.
